title: EventEnvelope
description: The envelope wrapping every message on the domain_events exchange (PLAN.md §2). Payload schemas live in per-event files: contracts/events/<routing-key>.v<N>.json.

eventId.description: Unique per event — the idempotency key consumers record in processed_messages

eventType.description: Routing key on the domain_events topic exchange, e.g. order.created

schemaVersion.description: Version of the payload schema for this eventType

correlationId.description: Set at saga origin (order placement), copied verbatim by every consumer that publishes in reaction
